_comment: Claude Code settings for a Forge-adopted repository. Merge into or replace .claude/settings.json. Delete this _comment key before use.
_usage: Copy to <repo-root>/.claude/settings.json. The forge-adopt scripts do this automatically.

hooks.command: echo '[FORGE] Session ended. Did you run EVAL.sh x3 before any commit/revert decision?' >&2

_notes.EVAL_reminder: The Stop hook above is a lightweight reminder. For a full pre-commit gate, add a PreToolUse hook on Bash matching 'git commit' that checks EVAL.sh has been run.

hooks.command: echo '[FORGE] Running git operation — ensure you have a 3-run EVAL.sh median before committing.' >&2
